arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé back in PSG squad to take on Nice in French league
arts.sum: PSG coach Luis Enrique was criticized after the loss for not selecting Dembélé, one of the most creative players in the team following the departure of Kylian Mbappé to Real Madrid. “There is just a problem of commitment toward the team, it’s not a problem between the player and the coach,” Enrique said through a translator.

arts.ttl: Samuele Ricci: “Manchester City and the national team? It’s nice, but I’m just thinking about Improving”
arts.sum: Torino midfielder Samuele Ricci addressed recent speculation about his future following his team’s 3-2 away loss to Inter Milan. Despite growing interest from Manchester City and potential national team call-ups, Ricci remains grounded and focused on his development. Reflecting on the match against Inter, Ricci said, “It was a bit like the game we played in Verona: that time there was a red card in our favor, tonight against us. These things can happen, football is also this. After the sending off, we continued to stay in the game, and we take home some positives.” When asked about handling the The post Samuele Ricci: “Manchester City and the national team? It’s nice, but I’m just thinking about Improving” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
